_comment_: Commission settings (USD per side, per contract).
Copy this file to 'commissions.json' and edit to match your broker fees.
Per-account overrides take precedence; otherwise the default rates apply.
Set a rate to 0 for Sim accounts or for symbols you don't trade.

per_account._comment_: Override default rates for specific account IDs (e.g. prop firm IDs). Set Sim accounts to 0.
